name: CAL-MAINE FOODS INC
business: Cal-Maine Foods is the largest producer and distributor of shell eggs in the United States. It sells shell eggs, egg products, and prepared foods. Its integrated operations include hatching chicks, growing flocks, manufacturing feed, and processing and packaging eggs.
sellsTo: Retail customers (grocery store chains, club stores, independent supermarkets)

exposures.sentence: We are the largest producer and distributor of shell eggs in the United States.

catalysts.event: Strategic investment in Crepini Foods, LLC
catalysts.sentence: Effective on September 9, 2024, we completed a strategic investment with Crepini LLC, establishing a new egg products and prepared foods venture.
we completed our acquisition of Echo Lake Foods on June 2, 2025.
